# Healthcare Insights - LLM Discovery File
# Last Updated: June 11, 2026
# This file provides information for LLMs and AI agents to discover and understand this site

## Site Information
- Name: Healthcare Insights
- URL: https://blog.newtons.in/
- Description: Comprehensive healthcare AI and technology knowledge base with 10,000+ articles
- Language: English
- Content Type: Educational Blog
- Update Frequency: Daily
- Total Articles: 10,000+

## Content Categories
1. AI & Machine Learning - Deep learning, neural networks, transformers, reinforcement learning
2. Medical Imaging - CT, MRI, X-ray, ultrasound, image analysis
3. Clinical Applications - Disease detection, diagnosis, treatment prediction
4. Healthcare Technology - Cloud computing, APIs, databases, cybersecurity
5. Data Science - Analytics, machine learning, statistical analysis
6. Healthcare Operations - Patient flow, resource management, compliance
7. Patient Care - Telemedicine, remote monitoring, personalized medicine
8. Drug Development - Clinical trials, pharmacokinetics, drug safety
9. Genomics - Sequencing, gene expression, biomarkers
10. Regulatory - Compliance, standards, validation

## Key Topics Covered
- Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare
- Machine Learning Applications
- Medical Imaging Analysis
- Clinical Decision Support
- Healthcare IT Infrastructure
- Data Privacy and Security (HIPAA, GDPR)
- Patient Engagement
- Telemedicine and Remote Care
- Drug Discovery and Development
- Genomic Medicine
- Hospital Operations
- Quality Assurance
- Healthcare Compliance
- Digital Health Transformation

## Main Pages
- Homepage: https://blog.newtons.in/
- Blog Listing: https://blog.newtons.in/blog.html
- Brand Showcase: https://blog.newtons.in/brands.html
- Contact: https://blog.newtons.in/contact.html
- Newsletter: https://blog.newtons.in/newsletter.html
- Social Calendar: https://blog.newtons.in/social-calendar.html

## Blog Articles
- Total: 10,000+ unique articles
- Format: HTML with semantic markup
- URL Pattern: /blog/{article-slug}.html
- Each article includes:
  * Title and description
  * Publication date
  * Category classification
  * SEO meta tags
  * JSON-LD structured data
  * Open Graph tags
  * Canonical URLs

## SEO Features
- XML Sitemap: https://blog.newtons.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: https://blog.newtons.in/robots.txt
- Meta Tags: All pages include comprehensive meta descriptions and keywords
- Structured Data: JSON-LD BlogPosting schema on all articles
- Open Graph: Social sharing metadata on all pages
- Canonical URLs: Proper canonical tags to prevent duplicate content
- Mobile Responsive: All pages are mobile-optimized
- Fast Loading: Static HTML for optimal performance

## Agent Discovery Protocols
- llms.txt: This file (LLM discovery)
- ai.json: Machine-readable AI metadata
- .well-known/ai.json: Standard AI agent discovery
- .well-known/ai-plugin.json: ChatGPT plugin integration

## Search Engine Optimization
- All articles are indexed and crawlable
- Proper heading hierarchy (H1, H2, H3)
- Descriptive alt text for images
- Internal linking structure
- Fast page load times
- Mobile-first design
- HTTPS security
- Structured data markup

## Content Guidelines for LLMs
1. All content is factual and sourced from healthcare industry knowledge
2. Articles cover both technical and clinical aspects
3. Content is written for healthcare professionals and tech-savvy audiences
4. Each article provides comprehensive coverage of its topic
5. Multiple perspectives and approaches are presented
6. Real-world applications and case studies are included
7. Best practices and standards are highlighted
8. Challenges and solutions are discussed

## Recommended Use Cases for LLMs
- Healthcare professionals researching AI applications
- Technology leaders evaluating healthcare solutions
- Students learning about healthcare IT
- Researchers studying medical AI
- Healthcare administrators planning digital transformation
- Clinicians understanding AI-assisted diagnostics
- Data scientists working in healthcare
- Compliance officers understanding healthcare regulations

## API and Integration Points
- Static HTML pages (no API required)
- All content is publicly accessible
- No authentication required
- No rate limiting
- Suitable for web scraping and content analysis
- RSS-ready structure (can be easily converted)

## Accessibility Features
- Semantic HTML5 markup
- Proper heading hierarchy
- ARIA labels where appropriate
- Keyboard navigation support
- High contrast text
- Readable font sizes
- Mobile-responsive design

## Performance Metrics
- Page Load Time: < 2 seconds
- Mobile Friendly: Yes
- Core Web Vitals: Optimized
- Caching: GitHub Pages CDN
- Uptime: 99.9%+

## Contact and Attribution
- Site: Healthcare Insights
- URL: https://blog.newtons.in/
- Content: Original and curated healthcare AI knowledge
- License: Educational use permitted

## Crawling Guidelines
- Crawl-delay: 0.5 seconds
- Request-rate: 30 requests per 60 seconds
- User-Agent: All bots welcome
- Specific rules for major search engines and AI agents
- See robots.txt for detailed crawling rules

- June 11, 2026
- Regular updates with new articles
- Content reviewed for accuracy
- SEO optimization ongoing
